S

sacco - package sacco
 
setScale(double) - Method in class sacco.StandingMario
Sets the scale of the StandingMario
setX(int) - Method in class sacco.StandingMario
Sets the x of the StandingMario
setY(int) - Method in class sacco.StandingMario
 
StandingMario - Class in sacco
 
StandingMario(int, int, double) - Constructor for class sacco.StandingMario
Constructs a new StandingMario object with the given x,y,and scale
StandingMario() - Constructor for class sacco.StandingMario
Constructs a new StandingMario at 0,0 with a scale of 1
